interfaces.name: getCategories
interfaces.description: Get the list of top-level product categories for navigation (used in header, home page, and category dropdowns).

interfaces.name: getFeaturedCategories
interfaces.description: Get a curated subset of categories to highlight on the home page for quick task starting (e.g., cartridge_filters, dosing_pumps).

interfaces.name: getFeaturedProducts
interfaces.description: Get a list of featured or popular products to display on the home page.

key_attributes.description: Short attributes for card display, e.g., '10 inch', '5 µm', 'stainless steel'

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search products by text query with optional filters and sorting (used by home search bar and search results page).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search text, e.g., '5 micron sediment filter cartridge', 'ro anti-scalant', '4040 ro membrane'

length_inches.description: Selected cartridge/housing lengths in inches, e.g., [10, 20]

package_weight_kg_min.description: Minimum package weight in kg, e.g., 25

package_weight_kg_max.description: Maximum package weight in kg, e.g., 25

key_attributes.description: Preformatted attributes for display, e.g., '10 inch', '5 µm', 'digital'

interfaces.name: getSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options (facets) for a given search query, used to render the sidebar filters on the search results page.

interfaces.name: getCategoryFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options (facets) for a given category, used to render sidebar filters on category listing pages.

interfaces.name: getCategoryProducts
interfaces.description: List products for a given category with filters and sorting applied (used by category listing pages).

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single product to display on the product detail page.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to display

attributes_display.description: Key attributes for display, e.g., '10 inch', '5 µm', 'stainless steel'

breadcrumbs.description: Breadcrumb trail for navigation back to category or search context (no URLs).

interfaces.name: addToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product to the cart with the specified quantity (creates the cart if needed; cart is managed internally).

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to add

item_count.description: Total quantity of items in cart

interfaces.name: getCartDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details of the current cart for the cart page.

estimated_shipping_note.description: High-level note about shipping, e.g., 'Free shipping may apply to some items'.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get a lightweight summary of the cart for header display (icon, item count, subtotal).

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart line item and return the updated cart.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the cart item to update

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: New quantity for this line item

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a specific line item from the cart and return the updated cart.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the cart item to remove

interfaces.name: clearCart
interfaces.description: Remove all items from the current cart.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get an order-ready summary of the current cart plus available shipping options for the checkout page.

interfaces.name: getShippingMethods
interfaces.description: Get all available shipping methods for display on checkout and Shipping & Returns pages.

interfaces.name: placeOrder
interfaces.description: Create an order from the current cart, with provided shipping and contact details.

parameters.name: agree_to_terms
parameters.description: User confirmation that they accept terms & conditions.

interfaces.name: addProductToComparison
interfaces.description: Add a product to the current comparison list (used from category and search result product cards, and product detail pages).

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to add to comparison

interfaces.name: removeProductFromComparison
interfaces.description: Remove a product from the current comparison list.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to remove from comparison

interfaces.name: getComparisonSummary
interfaces.description: Get a lightweight summary of the current comparison list for header or page UI (e.g., count of items).

interfaces.name: getComparisonDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for the current comparison list to build the comparison table page.

is_highest_max_conductivity.description: True for the product with the highest maximum conductivity (or widest measurement range) among compared items.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the About page explaining company background and expertise.

interfaces.name: getContactPageContent
interfaces.description: Get contact page details such as phone numbers, support emails, address, and response time expectations.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit an inquiry from the contact form (about products, orders, or technical support).

interfaces.name: getHelpFaqContent
interfaces.description: Get help and FAQ entries explaining ordering, shipping, returns, payments, and how to use site features.

interfaces.name: getShippingAndReturnsContent
interfaces.description: Get policy text for shipping and returns, including free shipping criteria and returns process.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get the privacy policy content describing data collection, usage, retention, and user rights.

interfaces.name: getTermsAndConditionsContent
interfaces.description: Get the terms and conditions content describing terms of sale and website usage.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get the current cart from storage or create a new one if it does not exist.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute cart subtotal, item_count, and line totals whenever items change.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentComparisonList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the single comparison list for the current user/session.

helperFunctions.name: _buildProductKeyAttributes
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to derive human-readable key attribute strings for product cards and cart lines (e.g., '10 inch', '5 µm', 'stainless steel').
